'''Jaboon''' were large, slow, four-legged herbivores with tusks native to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They were domesticated by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], for their prized hide, from which various armors and clothing could be produced. They would also give young Gungans rides on their backs at parties.

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[Episode I Adventures 11: Pirates from Beyond the Sea]]''
